title: Add JSONL persistence and scheduled crawl job
description: Implement JSONL storage for crawled posts, scheduled crawl script, app/CLI stored source integration, data gitignore, and tests.
close_reason: Implemented JSONL post persistence, scheduled crawl job, stored data source integration, and tests.

title: Fix fuzzy product normalization for noisy CVS titles
description: Implement PRD ¬ß11 improvements for product name noise stripping, synonym normalization, and grouping tests.
close_reason: Implemented product normalization noise and synonym handling with tests.

title: Implement ij2 suspicion detection upgrades
description: Implement docs/codex_ij2_brief.md tasks A-E: template-like detection, burst detection, suspicion config updates, internal detail reporting, and tests.
close_reason: Implemented ij2 template-like and burst suspicion detection, internal detail reporting, and tests; full pytest suite passes.

title: Merge adjacent same-user push comments in parser
description: Implement parser-level merging for adjacent same-user PTT push lines so cross-line sentiment is analyzed as one comment. Add unit tests and rerun gold_v1 polarity evaluation.
close_reason: Implemented adjacent same-user push merge, added parser tests, full unittest suite passed, gold_v1 lexicon polarity accuracy 0.9412.
